title: DETBuildingEnergyProfile
description: Annual building energy profile covering energy demand, costs, emissions, heating system and energy carrier information.

annualCarrierHeatingEnergyDemand.description: Annual heating energy demand covered by the selected non-electrical or thermal energy carrier.

annualCo2EmissionsTonnes.description: Total annual CO2 emissions in tonnes associated with the building energy profile.

annualElectricalHeatingEnergyDemand.description: Annual electrical energy demand used for heating.

annualElectricalPrimaryEnergyDemand.description: Annual primary energy demand associated with the building's electricity use.

annualEnergyCarrierHeatingCost.description: Annual cost associated with the selected heating energy carrier.

annualEnergyCarrierPrimaryDemand.description: Annual primary energy demand associated with the selected heating energy carrier.

annualHeatingEnergyDemand.description: Annual energy demand associated with building heating and domestic hot water.

annualHouseholdElectricalEnergyCost.description: Annual cost associated with household electrical energy demand excluding electricity used for heating.

annualHouseholdElectricalEnergyDemand.description: Annual household electrical energy demand excluding electricity used for heating.

annualPrimaryEnergyDemand.description: Total annual primary energy demand associated with the building energy profile.

annualTotalCost.description: Total annual energy cost of the building, including heating-related costs and electricity costs.

annualTotalElectricalEnergyDemand.description: Total annual electrical energy demand, including household electricity and electricity used for heating where applicable.

annualTotalEnergyDemand.description: Total annual energy demand of the building, including heating-related energy and electrical energy use.

annualTotalHeatingCost.description: Annual cost associated with heating, including thermal energy carrier costs and electricity used for heating where applicable.

currency.description: Currency code used for cost and rate attributes.

electricityBaseRate.description: Annual fixed electricity base rate used for the building energy cost profile.

electricityUnitRate.description: Electricity unit rate used for the building energy cost profile.

energyCarrierBaseRate.description: Fixed base rate used for the selected heating energy carrier.

energyCarrierType.description: Primary energy carrier used by the heating system.

energyCarrierUnit.description: Unit used for the selected heating energy carrier.

energyCarrierUnitRate.description: Unit rate used for the selected heating energy carrier.

heatingSystemType.description: Heating system type used for the building energy profile.
